query_summary: 01/01/2021: An explosive device detonated targeting the vehicle of security forces in Beir al-Abd, North Sinai, Egypt. Two security force members were killed and five others were injured in the blast. No group claimed responsibility for the incident.

faiss_candidates.summary: 01/21/2021: An explosive device detonated targeting a military patrol vehicle in Sheikh Zuweid, North Sinai, Egypt. One soldier was killed and three others were injured in the blast. The Sinai Province of the Islamic State claimed responsibility for the incident.
faiss_candidates.gname: Sinai Province of the Islamic State
faiss_candidates.weapdetail: A remote-controlled roadside bomb was used in the attack.
faiss_candidates.addnotes: Casualty information conflicts across sources. Following GTD protocol, the majority reliable estimate is reported here.
faiss_candidates.scite1: "Egypt officials: Bomb kills 1 police and wounds 3 in Sinai," Lancaster Online, January 22, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite2: "Egypt: Bomb explosion kills at least two military personnel in Sheikh Zuweid, Jan. 21," GardaWorld, January 21, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite3: "New Sinai Attack Leaves Four Egyptian Security Officers Dead Or Injured," South Front, January 22, 2021.

faiss_candidates.summary: 02/20/2021: An explosive device detonated targeting a local market in Busayrah, Deir ez-Zor, Syria. At least three people were killed and five others were injured in the blast. No group claimed responsibility for the incident; however, sources attributed the attack to the Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant (ISIL).
faiss_candidates.gname: Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant (ISIL)
faiss_candidates.motive: The specific motive is unknown; however, sources noted that the attack came days after the Syrian Democratic Forces (SDF) announced the capture of 87 Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant (ISIL) militants in Deir al-Zour.
faiss_candidates.weapdetail: An explosives-laden motorcycle was used in the attack.
faiss_candidates.scite1: "Syria.- Three civilians killed by motorbike bomb explosion in northern Syria," CE Noticias Financieras English, February 20, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite2: "Casualties reported in eastern Syria town bombing," Middle East sources, February 20, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite3: "Three civilians martyred, ten others injured in motorcar bomb explosion in Deir Ezzor countryside," Syrian Arab News Agency (SANA), February 20, 2021.

faiss_candidates.summary: 01/21/2021: An explosive device detonated targeting an international coalition logistics supply convoy in Abu Ghraib, Al Anbar, Iraq. One security guard was injured in the attack. Ashab al-Kahf claimed responsibility for the incident.
faiss_candidates.corp1: Combined Joint Task Force – Operation Inherent Resolve (CJTF-OIR)
faiss_candidates.target1: Combined Joint Task Force Supply Convoy
faiss_candidates.weapdetail: A roadside bomb was used in the attack.
faiss_candidates.scite1: "Two Roadside Bomb Attacks Target US Convoys in Southern Iraq," Islam Times, January 22, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite2: "A military convoy of the international coalition targeted an explosive device west of Baghdad," Al-Sharqiya, January 21, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite3: "ISHM: JANUARY 14 - JANUARY 21, 2021," Enabling Peace in Iraq Center, January 21, 2021.

query_summary: 01/01/2021: Assailants threw a grenade at a Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) camp in Pampore, Jammu and Kashmir, India. The grenade failed to explode and did not cause any casualties. No group claimed responsibility for the incident.

faiss_candidates.location: The incident occurred in the Barbarshah neighborhood.
faiss_candidates.summary: 06/26/2021: Assailants threw a grenade at a joint Jammu and Kashmir Police and Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) patrol in Barbarshah neighborhood, Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir, India. The grenade missed its intended target and struck civilians. One civilian was killed and three others were injured in the blast. No group claimed responsibility for the incident; however, sources attributed the attack to The Resistance Front (TRF).
faiss_candidates.addnotes: The victims included Mudasir Ahmad Bhat, Hilal Ahmad, Shahid Nazir, and Shakeela Bano.
faiss_candidates.scite1: "2 Lashkar terrorists killed in Kashmir encounter," MENAFN - Business & Finance News (English), July 16, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite2: "25-year-old youth injured in Srinagar grenade attack, dies," United News of India, June 27, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite3: "Civilian Killed, 3 Others Injured In Srinagar Grenade Blast," MENAFN - Business & Finance News (English), June 26, 2021.

faiss_candidates.location: The incident occurred in Urdu Bazar of Fateh Kadal neighborhood.
faiss_candidates.summary: 03/05/2021: Assailants threw a grenade at a police post in Urdu Bazar, Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir, India. There were no reported casualties in the blast. No group claimed responsibility for the incident; however, sources attributed the attack to The Resistance Front (TRF).

faiss_candidates.scite2: "Militant lob grenade at police post in Srinagar," Daily Excelsior.com, March 5, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite3: "Militants Attack Police Post, Trigger IED Blast," MENAFN - Business & Finance News (English), March 5, 2021.

query_summary: 01/01/2021: Assailants opened fire on the vehicle of Bismillah Adil Aimaq in Dara-e-Taimoor village, on the outskirts of Feroz Koh, Ghor, Afghanistan. Aimaq, editor of the local Sadai Ghor radio, was killed in the attack. No group claimed responsibility for the incident.

faiss_candidates.location: The incident occurred in Police District Five in Ferdawsi Square.
faiss_candidates.summary: 04/12/2021: Assailants opened fire on a military vehicle in Mazari Sharif, Balkh, Afghanistan. A military doctor and an army officer were killed in the attack. No group claimed responsibility for the incident; however, sources attributed the attack to the Taliban.
faiss_candidates.scite1: "Army doctor, and his driver assassinated in Balkh," Ariana News, April 12, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite2: "Afghanistan: 2 killed in gunmen attack in Balkh," Afghanistan Sun, April 12, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite3: "Senior military doctor, army officer shot dead in N. Afghanistan," SINA, April 12, 2021.

faiss_candidates.summary: 06/19/2021: Assailants opened fire on Tala Wa Barfak district, Baghlan, Afghanistan. One police officer and four assailants were killed while two officers and three assailants were injured in the ensuing clash. No group claimed responsibility for the incident; however, sources attributed the attack to the Taliban.
faiss_candidates.scite1: "Militants attack on major Afghan district repelled," MENAFN - Business & Finance News (English), June 19, 2021.

query_summary: 01/01/2021: Assailants threw a grenade at a Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) camp in Chanapora neighborhood, Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir, India. The grenade missed its intended target and did not cause any casualties. No group claimed responsibility for the incident.

faiss_candidates.location: The incident occurred in Mehjoor Nagar neighborhood.
faiss_candidates.summary: 04/26/2021: Assailants threw a petrol bomb at a Sashastra Seema Bal bunker in Mehjoor Nagar area, Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir, India. There were no reported casualties in the attack. No group claimed responsibility for the incident; however, sources attributed the attack to Lashkar-e-Taiba (LeT).
faiss_candidates.weapdetail: A petrol bomb was used in the attack.
faiss_candidates.scite1: "2 Lashkar terrorists killed in Kashmir encounter," MENAFN - Business & Finance News (English), July 16, 2021.

faiss_candidates.location: The incident occurred along the Srinagar and Baramulla highway.
faiss_candidates.summary: 06/28/2021: An assailant attempted to throw a grenade after being stopped at a police checkpoint along the Srinagar-Baramulla road near Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir, India. There were no reported casualties as the assailant was overpowered, and two individuals were arrested. This was one of two related attacks carried out by the same assailants on this date. No group claimed responsibility for the incident; however, sources attributed the attack to Lashkar-e-Taiba (LeT).
faiss_candidates.weapdetail: A hand grenade was used in the attack.
faiss_candidates.scite1: "Arrested Lashkar man's trap goes wrong, killed," The Times of India, July 1, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite2: "LeT commander, Pak militant killed in Srinagar encounter," United News of India, June 29, 2021.
faiss_candidates.scite3: "Day after arrest, LeT commander Nadeem Abrar Bhat killed in crossfire," Hindustan Times, June 29, 2021.

query_summary: 01/03/2021: A roadside explosive device detonated targeting a security checkpoint in Balcad, Middle Shebelle, Somalia. Two civilians were killed in the blast. This was one of two related attacks in Balcad on this date. No group claimed responsibility for the incident.

faiss_candidates.summary: 01/27/2021: Assailants detonated an explosive device and attacked a military vehicle near Balcad, Middle Shebelle, Somalia. faiss_candidates.addnotes: Casualty numbers represent a division of the total number of those killed and wounded across incidents 202101270030 and 202101270031. This incident is part of a set of coordinated attacks in which both military and non-military entities were targeted.

faiss_candidates.scite1: "Afghan War Casualty Report: March 2021," NYTimes.com Feed, March 4, 2021.

faiss_candidates.summary: 02/20/2021: Assailants shot and killed a civilian in Ab Kamari district, Badghis, Afghanistan. No group claimed responsibility for the incident; however, sources attributed the attack to the Taliban.
faiss_candidates.scite1: "Afghan War Casualty Report: February 2021," NYTimes.com Feed, February 4, 2021.

candidate_pool.location: The incident occurred in Muqdadiyah district.
candidate_pool.summary: 03/19/2021: Assailants shot and killed a police officer on the outskirts of Um al-Khanazir, Muqdadiyah district, Diyala, Iraq. No group claimed responsibility for the incident; however, sources attributed the attack to the Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant (ISIL).
candidate_pool.gname: Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant (ISIL)
candidate_pool.weapdetail: A sniper rifle was used in the attack.
candidate_pool.scite1: "Iraq announces death of policeman, arrest of two IS militants," Al-Sumaria TV website, March 19, 2021.
